name: restaurante-crud
description: CRUD do Sistema de Gestão de Restaurante - Banco de Dados II (Tema 4)

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
